intentSynonyms: make a new issue in linear
open a new issue in linear
create a new issue in linear
description: Create a new issue in Linear. Requires a team ID and title at minimum.

team_id.description: Team UUID to create the issue in (use list_teams to find team IDs)

assignee_id.description: UUID of the user to assign (use list_users to find user IDs)

state_id.description: Workflow state UUID (use list_workflow_states to find state IDs)

label_ids.description: Array of label UUIDs to apply (use list_labels to find label IDs)

project_id.description: Project UUID to add the issue to (use list_projects to find IDs)

cycle_id.description: Cycle UUID to add the issue to (use list_cycles to find IDs)

parent_id.description: Parent issue UUID for creating a sub-issue
